title: Sealapack READY TO USE CLING FILM, 30cm x 50 METRE ROLL, Clear
features: MULTI-PURPOSE: Sealapack Cling Film provides 50 metres on a ready to use roll. Perfect all-rounder for all kinds of food storage. Wrap foods when cool to protect and prevent transfer of food odours in storage
KEEP IT FRESH and COMPACT: Wrap foods to keep fresh, cover bowls or plates to store in the fridge. Use the size you need for compact covers and wraps

FREEZE and SAVE : Reduce food waste, wrap cooked foods to save for a later meal. Chop fresh foods, wrap and freeze. Cost saving, bulk buy and separate, perfect for wrapping chicken,chops,fish or burgers in portion sizes to suit you.
SEAL IN FLAVOUR: Wrap foods when cool to protect and prevent transfer of food odours in storage
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL 35CM x 50 METRE ROLL
